infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Snapchat requires access to the camera to capture photos and record videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Snapchat requires access to the microphone to record audio with video snaps.

plugins.cameraPermissionText: Snapchat requires access to the camera to capture photos and record videos.
plugins.microphonePermissionText: Snapchat requires access to the microphone to record audio with video snaps.
